chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 800 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 3346/26 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026 Mr. Akbar Sohail, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, Advocate for Respondents SRB. ---------- Mr. Javed Ali Sangi, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents Nos. 2 to 5 (SRB), which is taken on record. With reference to the Order dated 10.02.2026 made in this Petition, which frames the controversy, learned counsel for the Petitioner invites attention to various orders made by learned Division Benches of this Court under similar circumstances, including the Order dated 12.08.2024 made in C.P No. D- 3383 of 2024. He seeks that this Petition also be disposed of in similar terms. Counsel for the SRB does not oppose such submission. Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals) Sindh Revenue Board to decide the pending Appeal of the Petitioner without undue delay preferably within a period of 60 days from today, pending which no coercive action to be taken against the Petitioner for enforcing the impugned demand. Judge Judge Ayaz
